revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初三]][[zh:六月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初三]][[zh:六月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初三]][[zh:六月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初三]][[zh:六月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 3|qq=June 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:安元|安元]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1177|en|1177|qid=Q19694|lt=1177|1=1177}} {{ill|July 1|en|July 1|qid=Q2700|lt=July 1|1=July 1}}) – In the incident known as [[:en:鹿ケ谷の陰謀|鹿ケ谷の陰謀]], the conspirator {{ill|Shunkan|en|Shunkan|qid=Q73539|lt=Shunkwan|1=Shunkan}} was arrested.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|qid=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 1st year/[[:en:元弘|元弘]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1332|en|1332|qid=Q6001|lt=1332|1=1332}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|qid=Q2661|lt=June 26|1=June 26}}) – The anti-Bakufu (討幕) movement was exposed, and the arrested figure {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510567}} was executed at Katsuharaoka in Kamakura. * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1403|en|1403|qid=Q6117|lt=1403|1=1403}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|qid=Q2668|lt=June 23|1=June 23}}) – The seven-storied pagoda of {{ill|Shōkoku-ji|en|Shōkoku-ji|qid=Q1786709|lt=Sōkoku-ji|1=Shōkoku-ji}} burned down due to a lightning strike. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|qid=Q2663|lt=June 22|1=June 22}}) – In the Battle of Uozu Castle, those holed up inside, including {{ill|Nakajō Kagetai|ja|中条景泰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakajō Kagetai|1=Nakajō Kageyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10875716}}, committed seppuku, surrendering the castle (opening it) and ending the battle, while the Oda forces under {{ill|Shibata Katsuie|en|Shibata Katsuie|qid=Q707587|lt=Shibata Katsuie|1=Shibata Katsuie}} and the northern division of the Oda army secured the Hokuriku region. * In the same Tenshō 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1582, June 22) – At night, during the Battle of Takamatsu Castle in Bitchū, news of the Incident at Honno-ji reached {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q187550}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|qid=Q6765|lt=1610|1=1610}} {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22|1=July 22}}) – {{ill|Katō Kiyomasa|en|Katō Kiyomasa|qid=Q1069843|lt=Katō Kiyomasa|1=Katō Kiyomasa}} oversaw the construction of the entire Tenshu area of Nagoya Castle. * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}}) – {{ill|Satake Yoshinobu|ja|佐竹義宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satake Yoshinobu|qq=}}, lord of the Akita Domain, executed 33 Christians. * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}}) – Officials including {{ill|Ii Naotaka|en|Ii Naotaka|qid=Q877175|lt=Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naotaka}}, {{ill|Sakai Tadayuki (Kobama han's head)|ja|酒井忠勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Tadayuki (Kobama han's head)|1=Q11644107|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644107}}, {{ill|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|en|Matsudaira Nobutsuna|qid=Q6788056|lt=Matsudaira Nobutsuna|1=Matsudaira Nobutsuna}}, {{ill|Abe Tadaaki|en|Abe Tadaaki|qid=Q4666449|lt=Abe Tadaaki|1=Abe Tadaaki}}, and {{ill|Matsudaira Norinaga|en|Matsudaira Norinaga|qid=Q6788057|lt=Matsudaira Norijū|1=Matsudaira Norinaga}} inspected Ōoku, ordering the complete demolition of all unnecessary buildings. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – With the arrival of the Black Ships: four vessels from the U.S. East India Fleet (the "Black Ships") reached the bays of Edo (specifically near Uraga in Yokosuka). Admiral {{ill|Matthew C. Perry|en|Matthew C. Perry|qid=Q61855|lt=Matthew Perry|1=Matthew C. Perry}} delivered a message from the President of the United States to the Tokugawa shogunate, leading to the signing of the 【日米和親条約】 the following year.
== Births == * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|July 1|en|July 1|qid=Q2700|lt=July 1|1=July 1}}) – {{ill|Sakatam Sankichi|ja|坂田三吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakatam Sankichi|1=Sankichi Sakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11425490}}, a professional shogi player (died {{ill|1946|en|1946|qid=Q18610|lt=1946|1=1946}}). * 明治5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – {{ill|Nobutsuna Sasaki|en|Nobutsuna Sasaki|qid=Q462145|lt=Sasazaki Nobutsuna|1=Nobutsuna Sasaki}}, a waka poet and the grandfather of {{ill|Sasazaki Kōtsuna|ja|佐佐木幸綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sasazaki Kōtsuna|1=Yukitsuna Sasaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11382922}} (died {{ill|1963|en|1963|qid=Q2755|lt=1963|1=1963}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|qid=Q1069086|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō}} 1st year/{{ill|Genkō|en|Genkō|qid=Q844859|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1332|en|1332|qid=Q6001|lt=1332|1=1332}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|qid=Q2661|lt=June 26|1=June 26}}) – {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510567}}, a court noble and central figure in the anti-shogunate (討幕) plans of the Kamakura shogunate. * [[Enkei (Japan)|Enkei]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1491|en|1491|qid=Q6676|lt=1491|1=1491}} {{ill|July 9|en|July 9|qid=Q2690|lt=July 9|1=July 9}}) – {{ill|Hikoryū Shūkō|ja|彦竜周興|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikoryū Shūkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a Zen monk and Chinese poet (born {{ill|1443|en|1443|qid=Q6417|lt=1443|1=1443}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|2|6|4|5|3|7|6|0603|qq=}}
